name: Litomi AltStore Source
subtitle: Litomi iOS builds for AltStore Classic
description: Self-hosted AltStore Classic source for Litomi iOS builds. Installation and refresh require AltStore Classic, AltServer, and the user's own Apple account.

apps.name: Litomi
apps.subtitle: Litomi for AltStore Classic
apps.localizedDescription: Capacitor-based Litomi iOS build distributed for AltStore Classic sideloading. Install with AltStore Classic and refresh through AltServer.
